meta.title: Top 10 OpenCode Plugins
meta.description: Best recommended plugins for OpenCode AI coding agent

plugins.name: opencode-dynamic-context-pruning
plugins.description: Intelligently manages conversation context to optimize token usage. Automatically reduces token usage by pruning obsolete tool outputs and replacing closed conversation content with high-fidelity technical summaries.
plugins.longDescription: DCP reduces context size through a compress tool and automatic cleanup. Your session history is never modified — DCP replaces pruned content with placeholders before sending requests to your LLM. Compress is a tool exposed to your model that replaces closed, stale conversation content with high-fidelity technical summaries.
plugins.useCase: Essential for long coding sessions to reduce token costs by 40-60%

plugins.name: opencode-morph-plugin
plugins.description: Fast Apply editing with 10,500+ tok/s code merging, WarpGrep codebase search, and automatic context compaction via Morph API.
plugins.longDescription: Four powerful tools: Fast Apply for 10,500+ tok/s code editing with lazy markers, WarpGrep for fast agentic codebase search (+4% on SWE-Bench Pro, -15% cost), Public Repo Context for searching GitHub repos without cloning, and Compaction for 25,000+ tok/s context compression in sub-2s.
plugins.useCase: Best for large files (300+ lines) and multiple scattered changes

plugins.name: opencode-tool-search
plugins.description: Implements Claude's Tool Search pattern — BM25 + regex search to discover tools on demand, reducing context usage by 69-85%.
plugins.longDescription: An OpenCode plugin that implements Claude's Tool Search Tool pattern. Reduces context usage by deferring tool descriptions and letting the model discover tools on demand via BM25 keyword search or regex matching. Inspired by famitzsy8/opencode-tool-search-tool.
plugins.useCase: Reduces context usage by 69-85% by deferring tool descriptions

plugins.name: opencode-model-fallback
plugins.description: Automatic model fallback plugin for OpenCode. When a model API call fails, the plugin transparently switches to the next model in a configured fallback chain.
plugins.longDescription: When a primary model becomes rate-limited, overloaded, times out, or hits a configured 5xx path, the plugin automatically redirects or replays the message with the next healthy model in your fallback chain. It helps keep OpenCode sessions running when GPT, Claude, Gemini, and other providers temporarily stop accepting requests.
plugins.useCase: Critical for production use to prevent downtime from rate limits

plugins.name: oh-my-opencode
plugins.description: Full multi-agent orchestration harness with background agents, pre-built LSP/AST/MCP tools, curated agents, and Claude Code compatibility.
plugins.longDescription: Slimmed-down fork of oh-my-opencode focused on core agent orchestration. Features specialized sub-agents (Explorer, Oracle, Librarian, Designer, etc.), background task management, LSP/AST tools, tmux integration for live agent visibility, and MCP servers. Optimized to consume significantly fewer tokens.
plugins.useCase: Best for complex multi-agent workflows and parallel coding tasks

plugins.name: opencode-background-agents
plugins.description: Claude Code-style background agents for OpenCode with async delegation and context persistence.
plugins.longDescription: Claude Code-style background agents for OpenCode – async delegation with context persistence. Enables running multiple background agents that can handle tasks asynchronously while maintaining context across sessions.
plugins.useCase: Run background tasks without blocking main agent workflow

plugins.name: claude-code-safety-net
plugins.description: Safety net plugin that catches destructive git and filesystem commands before they execute. 9.3k downloads with 5.0 rating.
plugins.longDescription: A Claude Code plugin that acts as a safety net, catching destructive git and filesystem commands before they execute. Prevents accidental deletions, force pushes, and destructive file operations.
plugins.useCase: Essential for preventing catastrophic mistakes in production

plugins.name: opencode-openai-codex-auth
plugins.description: Use your ChatGPT Plus/Pro subscription instead of API credits. Significant cost savings for existing subscribers.
plugins.longDescription: OpenCode plugin that brings GitHub Copilot's custom instructions and skills system to OpenCode. If you already have Copilot customization files set up, they work in OpenCode with no changes.
plugins.useCase: Save costs by using existing ChatGPT subscription for OpenCode

plugins.name: opencode-copilot-plugin
plugins.description: Brings GitHub Copilot's custom instructions, skills, agents, and hooks system into OpenCode.
plugins.longDescription: An OpenCode plugin that brings GitHub Copilot's custom instruction, prompt, skill, agent, and hook file system into OpenCode. If you already have Copilot customization files set up, they work in OpenCode with no changes.
plugins.useCase: Leverage existing Copilot customizations in OpenCode

plugins.name: opencode-notify
plugins.description: Native OS desktop notifications for OpenCode — know when tasks complete without staring at the terminal.
plugins.longDescription: Native OS notifications for OpenCode – know when tasks complete. Supports desktop notifications and sound alerts for OpenCode sessions, permission, completion, and error events.
plugins.useCase: Stay informed when long-running tasks complete

honorableMentions.name: opencode-gemini-auth
honorableMentions.description: Use existing Gemini plan instead of API billing

honorableMentions.name: opencode-snip
honorableMentions.description: 60-90% token reduction on shell command output

honorableMentions.name: opencode-mystatus
honorableMentions.description: Check all AI subscription quotas in one command

honorableMentions.name: opencode-sentry-monitor
honorableMentions.description: Trace and debug AI agents with Sentry AI Monitoring

honorableMentions.name: opencode-daytona
honorableMentions.description: Run OpenCode sessions in isolated Daytona sandboxes

honorableMentions.name: opencode-devcontainers
honorableMentions.description: Multi-branch devcontainer isolation with auto-assigned ports

honorableMentions.name: opencode-worktree
honorableMentions.description: Zero-friction git worktrees with auto-spawned terminals
